policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM academy_courses c
  WHERE ((c.id = academy_lessons.course_id) AND (c.is_published OR is_admin()))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM academy_conversations c
  WHERE ((c.id = academy_messages.conversation_id) AND (auth.uid() = ANY (c.participant_ids)))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'admin'::text))))
policies.with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'admin'::text))))

policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ambassador_links l
  WHERE ((l.id = ambassador_clicks.link_id) AND (l.ambassador_id = auth.uid()))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'admin'::text))))
policies.with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'admin'::text))))

policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM orders
  WHERE ((orders.id = order_items.order_id) AND (orders.customer_id = auth.uid()))))

((ambassador_id = auth.uid()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM promo_codes pc
  WHERE ((pc.id = orders.promo_code_id) AND (pc.ambassador_id = auth.uid())))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'admin'::text))))
policies.with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'admin'::text))))

policies.qual:
((id = auth.uid()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM user_roles ur
  WHERE ((ur.user_id = profiles.id) AND (ur.role = ANY (ARRAY['ambassador'::text, 'admin'::text]))))) OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'ambassador'::text) OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::text))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'admin'::text))))
policies.with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'admin'::text))))

policies.policyname: Allow role insertion for new users
